task_title: Make PCC's canonical cross-cutting requirements executable (two-phase enforcement)

prior_art.finding: Automated per-change convention enforcement. Pattern adopted; dependency rejected — PR/CI-time + GitHub-centric, while PCC already blocks earlier at a local pre-commit governor.

Policy-as-code over structured JSON with non-zero exit gating — closest structural match. Dependency rejected: adds a Go binary + Rego; PCC already validates JSON via Test-Json in PowerShell. Concept reused.

Cross-cutting fitness functions injected into a shared pipeline all work inherits; explicitly warns AGAINST scoring systems. Vocabulary + shape adopted; matches the owner's no-dashboard/no-score boundary.

Attestations must bind to an exact digest and fail closed when missing/invalid; provenance bound to a mutable subject is a known bypass. Directly diagnoses the base==head/tier-NONE receipt defect and dictates digest-binding the preflight.

reuse_decision.rationale: Extend PCC's existing governor + receipt + trailer + CI-audit chain rather than install a second policy platform (OPA/Danger). A parallel enforcement path alongside the existing governor is itself a failure mode; reuse the proven local seams.

deterministic_work: check-canonical-constraints.ps1 (registry load, drift check, two phases)
llm_work: the PreToolUse hook-contract proof required 4 tiny haiku smokes (undocumented CLI behavior, could not be proven statically)
one final independent Codex diff review
duplication_avoidance: One checker invoked in two phases (not two gates); registry CITES CLAUDE.md rather than restating it; reuses Get-ChangeIdentity/Get-ChangeTier, the existing receipt, trailer, and CI auditor. No new dependency.

usage_plan.baseline: n/a — this change adds enforcement, it does not change model/session/caching/rollover/spawn/tool-profile/measurement behavior
usage_plan.max_authorized_usage: 4 haiku hook-contract smokes (spent) + 1 Codex diff review
stopping_conditions: hook contract not honored in either launch mode -> STOP (it was honored)
Codex FAIL on material finding -> fix then re-review
usage_plan.completion_evidence: focused tests green; hook contract proven; Codex PASS; exact-head CI green

not_proven: This introducing PR is bootstrapped under the EXISTING governor and trusted-main CI auditor; the new server-side enforcement does not govern its own introduction. After merge it becomes authoritative and corrected Gate 0 is the first fully-governed task.
